title: Circulon 61300 - Momemtum - Stainless Steel Cookware Set - Total Non Stick - Induction Suitable - PFAO Free - Set of 4
features: ✅ STAINLESS STEEL - the long lasting stainless steel cookware will ensure prefect fast, even heat distribution and no warping. Every delicious meal will be a success for years to come.
✅ TOTAL NON STICK - our Total Non Stick System creates a long lasting non stick cookware. Our technology will allow you to cook healthier meals with no or little oil and save time on cleaning up.
✅ INDUCTION SUITABLE - our induction stainless steel cookware set is suitable for all hobs, including induction or gas. Whatever you prefer, you will be able to cook delicious meals.
✅ OVEN AND DISHWASHER SAFE - oven safe cookware up to 204°C to allow you to create delicious and creative meals. Dishwasher safe to spend more time doing what you like and less time cleaning.
✅ COMPLETE SAUCEPAN SET - This stainless steel cookware set contains 1x 16cm saucepan with lid, 1x 18cm saucepan with lid, 1x 20cm saucepan with glass lid and 1x 25cm frying pan
description: From the manufacturer What You get Stainless Steel Total Non Stick Induction Suitable Oven Safe (up to 204°C) Soft Grip handles Oven Safe Dishwasher Safe Metal Utensil Safe Circulon Momentum Stainless Steel Non Stick Cookware The Circulon Momentum Stainless Steel cookware range uses our Total Non Stick technology. The unique and famous Hi-Low groove design protects the surface from abrasion. The Stainless Steel construction delivers long lasting beautiful pans. It also offers fast and even heating. The handles have a silicone overlay for your comfort and are riveted to the body. The lid handles and pan handles have a silicone overlay for easy handling and to keep cool. Safety first - All the range is PFOA free, Lead Free and Cadnium Free Non Stick Frying Pan Non Stick Saucepan Covered Sauté Saucepan Set Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 44 4.5 out of 5 stars 36 4.8 out of 5 stars 67 4.5 out of 5 stars 118 Stainless Steel ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Total Non Stick ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Soft Grip Handles ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Hob Type All Hobs All Hobs All Hobs All Hobs Oven Safe Yes - up to up to 204°C Yes - up to up to 204°C Yes - up to up to 204°C Yes - up to up to 204°C Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ PFAO Free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Glass Tempered Lids No ✓ ✓ ✓ Included : 1 x 22cm Frying Pan 1 x 18cm Saucepan 1 x 24cm Sauté 1x 14cm milkpan - 1 x 16cm Saucepan - 1 x 18cm Saucepan - 1 x 20cm Saucepan - 1 x 25.4cm Frying Pan.
